  • Uses of TagConfig in jakarta.faces.view.facelets

    Subinterfaces of TagConfig in jakarta.faces.view.facelets
    Modifier and Type
    Interface
    Description
    interface 
    BehaviorConfig
    Convey the id of a behavior declared in a view.
    interface 
    ComponentConfig
    Passed to the constructor of ComponentHandler.
    interface 
    ConverterConfig
    A Facelet version of the Jakarta Server Pages ConverterTag.
    interface 
    ValidatorConfig
    Used in creating ValidatorHandler and all implementations.

    Description
